gc_controller_deployment.note: Pods stuck Pending due to scheduler instability. Not part of v1.34 validation scope.

known_issues: Control-plane stability: periodic crash-loops due to containerd sandbox_image mismatch (pause:3.8 vs pause:3.10.1). Fixed in config, but backoff accumulation causes re-cycling.
Runtime controller reconciliation not validated on v1.34.
limitations: CRD/API compatibility only — no runtime controller proof claimed for v1.34
Only tested on single-node control-plane with flannel CNI
kind and k3d/K3s not tested on v1.34
For runtime-controller evidence see v1.36 kind and k3d reports
